# Remembering Iris: The Iris Murdoch Podcast

[Iris Murdoch](https://irishphilosophy.com/category/person/contemporary/iris-murdoch/) • [C. M. Barry](https://irishphilosophy.com/author/cathy/ "View all posts by C. M. Barry") • 02/08/2024

Iris Murdoch died twenty-five years ago today, on 8th February 1999.

No better day, then, to listen to the long-running Iris Murdoch Podcast. The podcast covers a wide range of topics, including Murdoch’s novels, her life (including the one embedded above) her philosophy (for example [this](https://soundcloud.com/user-548804258/metaphysics-as-a-guide-to-morals-podcast-1?utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing) and [this](https://soundcloud.com/user-548804258/metaphysics-as-a-guide-to-morals-podcast-2?utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing) on Murdoch’s “Metaphysics as a Guide to Morals” and [this](https://soundcloud.com/user-548804258/sovereignty-of-good-podcast?utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing) on her “Sovereignty of Good”), books about her (among those of philosophical interest are this about [“Iris Murdoch’s Practical Metaphysics”, a book on her early writings](https://soundcloud.com/user-548804258/iris-murdochs-practical-metaphysics) , and [this on the “Ethics of Attention”)](https://soundcloud.com/user-548804258/ethics-of-attention-podcast?utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing) and so much more.

A labour of love by the Iris Murdoch Society and a gift to the rest of us.
